title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: EVERGREEN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams, including sports physicals; treatment of illness and injury; vision, and blood pressure screenings; immunizations; mental health services; age-appropriate reproductive health; routine lab tests; prescription medication maintenance; and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 520 W River Street Cave Junction, OR 97523 Eligibility: Students and staff of schools in the Three Rivers School District Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-3:30pm, while school is in session (541) 592-6491 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 592-6491 Main phone Main phone (541) 592-6491 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Three Rivers School District SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-3pm during the school session Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EVERGREEN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL SBHC
